name: 🎙️ Convert voice notes to X posts with Google Drive and AssemblyAI

nodes.name: Watch Google Drive Folder
nodes.notes:
📁 Watch for New Voice Notes

Monitors a specific Google Drive folder for uploaded audio files.

🔹 Supported formats: .mp3, .m4a, .wav

💡 Tip: Name files clearly (e.g., 'Tip-about-boundaries.m4a')

Triggers when a new audio file is added.

nodes.name: Transcribe with AssemblyAI
nodes.notes:
🎙️ Transcribe Audio to Text

Sends the voice note to AssemblyAI for speech-to-text conversion.

🔐 Requires:
- AssemblyAI API key
- Publicly accessible file (Google Drive link)

💡 Response includes transcript + key phrases.

Wait for completion (add delay or webhook if needed).

nodes.name: Post to X (Twitter)
nodes.notes:
🐦 Post to X (Twitter)

Publishes the transcribed text as a tweet.

🔧 Customize:
- Add hashtags
- Trim to 280 chars
- Thread long content

💡 Use a Function node before to clean up text (remove filler words, add emojis).
